headline: Sirion Recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Voice of the Customer for Contract Life Cycle Management Report for the Fourth Consecutive Year
summary: Only CLM vendor to be recognized as a Customers' Choice every year since the report's inception Sirion Recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Voice of the Customer Sirion, a global leader in AI-native Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM), today announced that it has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Voice of the Customer1 for Contract Life Cycle Management Report. Sirion is the only CLM vendor to be positioned in the Customers' Choice Quadrant for four ye

thumbnail.caption: Sirion, a global leader in AI-native Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM), today announced that it has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Voice of the Customer1 for Contract Life Cycle Management Report. Sirion is the only CLM vendor to be positioned in the Customers' Choice Quadrant for four years in a row.
